attributes.action: Stop restaurants and bars from adding service charges themselves
attributes.additional_details: I want the government to make it illegal for bars and restaurants to add service charges themselves.
attributes.background: Automatically imposed service charges turn a good experience into an awkward one. Tipping should be the customer’s choice, not assumed. The UK is not the US: we have strong minimum wage and employment laws to protect service workers without mandatory charges

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Ban default service charges and pre-set digital tip screens in hospitality" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/764909
